FluentYTDL Pro

Version __version__

Welcome to FluentYTDL Pro.

This wizard will help you quickly get familiar with the basic workflow, modules, and core features of the system.
\n<div style=\"text-align:left; padding::
👉 Quick Workflow (Recommended)

You can enable "Clipboard Auto Detect" in Settings → Automation.

Once enabled, when the system detects supported media links in the background, it automatically wakes up the parsing window. Just click download to create a task.

✍️ Standard Parsing Workflow

1. Copy the media link and paste it into the search bar on the home page.
2. Press Enter or click the parse button on the right to start the engine.
3. The system will display available video qualities and audio tracks. Select as needed and confirm download.

✅ Tip: Core parsing and merging pipelines (yt-dlp, FFmpeg) are pre-installed in the system, no extra environment setup is required.

When downloading age-restricted, members-only videos, or encountering server bot detection blocks, the system requires identity credentials.

Authentication Access Solutions

Access MethodRecommendationDescription
WebView2 Login⭐⭐⭐Authorize account through an isolated secure sandbox environment. Highest stability, official recommended choice.
Local Browser Extraction⭐⭐Automatically extract credentials from browsers like Firefox via API. Some browsers restricted due to security policies.
External File Import⭐Export standard Netscape format files via browser extension and import into the system.

🛡️ Privacy Compliance: The system only retains authentication tokens needed to maintain the download session, automatically filtering out other tracking data.

System Core Features

🛡️ Quality Guard Engine
Dual pre- and post-quality checks intercept abnormal resolution downgrades to ensure download quality.
🔊 Smart Audio Scoring Mechanism
Scores based on linguistic analysis, prioritizing high-quality original or human-dubbed tracks for you.
⚡ Ultra-fast Channel & Playlist Parsing
Builds a three-tier priority scheduling system supporting viewport awareness and lazy loading for massive playlists.
🎵 Smart Segment Skipping (SponsorBlock)
Connects to a crowdsourced database to automatically identify and skip sponsorships and promotions in the processing pipeline.
🥽 VR Spatial Post-processing Pipeline
Automatically converts projections and injects spatial metadata for VR180/360 videos.
🔄 Task State Persistence
Manages task lifecycles using SQLite at the base level, supporting seamless recovery after crashes or unexpected restarts.

Sidebar Navigation

🏠 Home / Basic Parsing
Core workspace. Paste a link to parse a single video or entire playlist, and freely assemble quality and audio tracks.
📺 Channel Download
Designed specifically for channel-level archiving. Supports dynamic lazy loading of all videos in a channel and one-click bulk task creation.
🥽 VR Download
Independent VR processing pipeline. Automatically extracts VR panoramic formats and re-projects them for mainstream headsets.
📝 Material Extraction (Subtitles/Covers)
Provides an independent extraction page. Quickly get multi-language subtitles and HD posters without downloading huge video files.
⬇️ Task List
Unified download scheduling center. Supports global pause, start, and batch management of the task queue.
⚙️ Settings Center
Provides authentication (Cookie) authorization, underlying component maintenance, concurrency adjustment, and other core preferences.

🚀

All Set

Core service processes have been initialized. You can now start creating download tasks.

⚠️ Core Component Update Warning

Streaming platform protection strategies are updated very frequently. If you encounter large-scale parsing errors, HTTP 403 exceptions, or frequent bot verification blocks in the future, it is usually because upstream strategies have changed.

👉 Troubleshooting Step 1: Please immediately go to the "Settings → Updates" page and upgrade internal core components to the latest version. 99% of parsing issues can be resolved this way.
\n<h3>基本操作</h3>\n<p>复制任意 YouTube 链接，在主页按:
Basic Operation

Copy any YouTube link, press Ctrl+V or click the paste button on the home page, and hit Enter to start parsing.

Supported Link Types

TypeExample
Single Videoyoutube.com/watch?v=...
Playlistyoutube.com/playlist?list=...
Channel Homeyoutube.com/@channel
Shortsyoutube.com/shorts/...

💡 Tip: Hundreds of sites like Bilibili, Patreon are supported (via yt-dlp), but FluentYTDL UI is optimized for YouTube.
\n<h3>自动模式（默认）</h3>\n<p>软件默认智能选择最佳画质，优先下:
Auto Mode (Default)

The software intelligently selects the best quality by default, prioritizing 1080p/4K HD formats. No manual intervention is needed.

A+B Pro Mode

After parsing, click the "Select Format" button to freely combine video and audio streams:

  • Video Stream: Select resolution (e.g. 4K, 1080p) and codec (H.264, VP9, AV1)
  • Audio Stream: Select audio quality (e.g. Hi-Res Opus 256kbps, AAC 128kbps)

For example: 4K VP9 Video + Hi-Res Opus Audio = Perfect file with best visual + audio quality.

Why is it maxed out at 1080p?

  • Video just released; 4K/8K encoding takes hours. Try again later.
  • Risk control downgrade: Need to import Cookie + use clean IP.
  • Missing Deno JS runtime: Go to "Settings → Core Components" to check installation.
  • yt-dlp outdated: Update components.
\n<h3>开启方式</h3>\n<p>进入 <strong>设置 → 自动化<:
How to Enable

Go to Settings → Automation and turn on the "Clipboard Auto Detect" switch.

How it Works

Once enabled, the software listens to the clipboard in the background. Whenever you copy a YouTube link, a download confirmation window pops up automatically.

💡 Recommended: This is the most efficient way to use the app, especially for users who download frequently.
\n<h3>批量操作</h3>\n<p>在下载列表中，使用工具栏上的「批量选择」:
Batch Operation

In the task list, use the "Batch Select" button to pause, resume, or delete multiple tasks at once.

Playlist Global Format Presets

After parsing a playlist, use the "Format Settings" button to unify resolutions and formats for all videos.

Concurrency Control Advice

ScenarioAdvice
Daily DownloadKeep default concurrent tasks
Large Playlists (500+)Parse in batches to avoid triggering risk controls
Unstable NetworkReduce concurrent fragments
\n<h3>三种获取方式对比</h3>\n<table>\n<tr><th>方式:
Comparison of the Three Methods

MethodRecommendationDescription
WebView2 Login获取Highly RecommendedLogin via isolated sandbox popup. 1-click fetch, no compatibility issues.
Firefox Auto-ExtractRecommendedNo admin privileges needed, stable and reliable.
Manual ImportFallback MethodExport cookies.txt via extension and import. Requires regular updates.

WebView2 Login Workflow

  1. Click "WebView2 Login Fetch" to open an isolated sandbox window.
  2. Log into your Google/YouTube account normally in the sandbox.
  3. The software automatically detects login state, collects, and cleans the Cookie.
  4. Cookie is auto-synced to yt-dlp, done!

Browser Compatibility

BrowserAuto ExtractDescription
FirefoxStableNo admin rights needed. Recommended choice.
EdgeAdmin RequiredApp-Bound Encryption limitations.
ChromeMostly Unusablev127+ encryption mechanism prevents third-party decryption.

💡 Important: Chrome auto-extraction is extremely unstable. If you use Chrome and fail frequently, switch to WebView2 or Firefox.
\n<h3>什么是 PO Token？</h3>\n<p><strong>PO:
What is a PO Token?

PO Token is a digital token used by YouTube to verify request origins.

Symptoms of missing PO Token

  • Triggers "Sign in to confirm you're not a bot" verification.
  • High quality formats are hidden (returns only 720p or lower).
  • Directly returns HTTP 403 Forbidden.

PO Token vs Cookie

PO TokenCookie
Proves WhatRequest is from a legit clientUser identity and login state
Solves WhatBot detection, basic format accessAge-restrictions, members-only, high bitrate streams
Missing ConsequenceBot verification, restricted qualityUnable to download restricted content

💡 Best Practice: Enabling both is the most stable configuration.

POT Provider Warmup

At app startup, POT Provider requires 5-15 seconds to initialize the BotGuard environment.
\n<h3>默认行为</h3>\n<p>FluentYTDL 默认「跟随系统代理:
Default Behavior

FluentYTDL defaults to "Follow System Proxy".

Proxy Software Config

SoftwareAction
V2RayNSet bottom bar to "System Proxy", or turn on TUN.
Clash Verge / CFWEnable "System Proxy" switch, or turn on TUN.
OtherEnsure "System Proxy" / "Global Mode" is enabled.

Manual Proxy Config

If auto-proxy fails, go to Settings → Network Connection, select "Manual Config".

💡 Note: Long-term manual proxy isn't recommended.

DNS Errors / Connection Resets

  • Port Mismatch: Check if the port in settings matches your proxy software.
  • Blocked Node: Switch to a node in a different country/region.
  • TUN Mode: When enabled, the software intercepts all system traffic.
\n<h3>遇到 \"Sign in to confirm you're not:
When facing "Sign in to confirm you're not a bot"

Try in order of priority:

  1. Click Auto-Fix Wizard — Auto-diagnoses root cause and fixes in 1-click.
  2. Update yt-dlp — Go to "Settings → Core Components" (most effective).
  3. Refresh Cookie — Recommend re-logging via WebView2.
  4. Change Proxy Node — Current IP might be flagged.

Login Required / Insufficient Permissions

Cookie import is required for:

  • Age-restricted (18+) content.
  • Channel members-only content.
  • Ultra-high bitrate streams protected by strong risk controls.
  • Private videos.

💡 Tip: The vast majority of public videos do not require login.

Verification Errors after Profile Update

Changing usernames triggers Google security checks. Fix: Logout → Relogin → Fetch Cookie.
\n<h3>工作原理</h3>\n<p>SponsorBlock 社区维护了一个:
How it Works

The SponsorBlock community maintains a database mapping sponsor segments.

Supported Categories

CategoryDescription
sponsorSponsorship adverts
selfpromoChannel self-promotions
interactionSubscribe/like reminders

Action Types

  • Remove: Uses FFmpeg to automatically crop out ad segments.
  • Mark: Marks ad segments as chapters.

Enable and configure in Settings → Download Options → SponsorBlock.
\n<h3>自动检测机制</h3>\n<p>FluentYTDL 解析视频时自动:
Auto Detect Mechanism

FluentYTDL auto-detects VR content and uses the android_vr client to fetch formats.

Three Projection Types

Projection TypeDescriptionVisual Charasteristics
EquirectangularMost common 360 format2:1 aspect ratio, stretched top/bottom
MeshCommon in VR180Circular fisheye visuals
EACYouTube proprietary efficient formatUnfolded cube map (six faces)

Playback Instructions

It's normal for VR videos to appear distorted in standard players. Use a VR headset.

💡 Note: 8K transcoding of EAC formats consumes extreme resources.
\n<h3>三个核心概念</h3>\n<p>视频文件 = <strong>容器<:
Three Core Concepts

Video File = Container + Video Codec + Audio Codec

Video Codec Comparison

CodecFeaturesCompatibility
H.264 (AVC)Oldest, highest compatibilityWorks on all platforms
VP9Mainstream for YouTube HDGood on PC/Phones, some TVs struggle
AV1Highest compression efficiencyNew devices support it, old devices usually don't

Container Format Comparison

ContainerSupported CodecsSubtitlesMulti-Track
MP4H.264+AAC perfect / VP9 limitedSingle trackLimited
MKVAlmost all codecsFull multi-trackFull support
WebMVP9/AV1+OpusNo SRT/ASS supportLimited

FluentYTDL Smart Container Decision

  • Multi-track audio/subtitles embedded → Auto-upgrades to MKV
  • MP4 + m4a audio → MP4 (Lossless remux)
  • Other mixed codecs → MKV (Universal container)

💡 What is remux? Repackaging audio/video without re-encoding.
\n<h3>任务持久化</h3>\n<p>FluentYTDL 使用 SQLit:
Task Persistence

FluentYTDL uses an SQLite database (WAL mode) to store all download tasks.

Crash Recovery

If the program closes during download, the task list remains completely preserved.

Downgrade Strategy

  • Tasks that were "Running" automatically downgrade to "Paused" status.
  • Pure extraction tasks (Cover/Subtitle) are marked as errors upon restart.

💡 Tip: You can safely close the software during a download.

Core Components Overview

Management

On the Settings → Core Components page, you can check installation status.

yt-dlp Update Channels

ChannelFrequencyStabilityUse Case

Emergency Self-Rescue Guide

When YouTube makes massive layout changes causing all downloads to fail:

  1. First try updating the stable channel.
  2. If stable hasn't caught up, temporarily switch to nightly.
  3. Switch back to stable once fixes are merged.

Mirror Source Configuration

Users in mainland China can switch to the 'ghproxy' mirror to accelerate GitHub downloads.

Concurrent Fragment Count

ValueUse CaseRisk
1-2Unstable network, low proxy bandwidthNone
4 (Default)Best balance for most scenariosNone

Download Rate Limit

Configure speed limits under "Settings → Download Options".

  • Preventing downloads from eating up all your bandwidth.
  • Reducing the probability of triggering risk controls.
  • Long-term background downloads.

Deep Dive into 403 Forbidden

This is the most common issue. YouTube blocks "non-browser" traffic. Solutions:

  1. Update Cookie (Recommended): Relogin via WebView2.
  2. Change Node: Public nodes are easily blocked. Switch to an obscure one.
  3. Update yt-dlp: The community continually adapts to YouTube's anti-scraping changes.

💡 Tip: 403 IP bans usually lift after 12-24 hours. Changing nodes is the fastest fix.
\n<h3>获取运行日志</h3>\n<ol>\n<li>进入 <strong>:
Fetch Run Logs

  1. Go to Settings → System → Log Management
  2. Click the folder icon on the right to open the log directory

You can also click "View Logs" for a real-time preview inside the app.

One-Click Bug Reporting

Click the "Report this Error" icon button on the error card to auto-fill the error information.

💡 Tip: Attaching log files helps developers locate issues much faster.
